stories.original_headline: Massive asteroid impact 6.3 million years ago left giant glass field in Brazil
stories.original_summary: For the first time ever, scientists have uncovered a vast field of tektites in Brazil — mysterious glassy fragments forged when a powerful extraterrestrial object slammed into Earth about 6.3 million years ago. Named “geraisites” after Minas Gerais, where they were first found, these dark, aerodynam
stories.fantasy_headline: Ancient Sky-Rock Crash Leaves Strange Glass Shards in Southern Lands!
stories.fantasy_story: Wizards from the Northern Enclave have found a vast field of curious glassy fragments in the distant southern lands. These mysterious shards, named 'Geraisites,' were forged millions of years ago when a powerful celestial object slammed into the earth, leaving behind this wondrous sight.

stories.original_headline: Scientists just created chocolate honey packed with surprising health perks
stories.original_summary: Scientists in Brazil have transformed cocoa waste into a functional chocolate-infused honey packed with antioxidants and natural stimulants. Using ultrasound waves, they enhanced honey’s ability to pull beneficial compounds from cocoa shells—no synthetic solvents required. The process is considered
stories.fantasy_headline: Alchemists Brew New Honey with Cocoa's Magical Vigor!
stories.fantasy_story: Alchemists from a Southern Kingdom have transformed leftover cocoa husks into a wondrous, chocolate-infused honey. Using sonic enchantments, they boosted the honey's power to draw out beneficial compounds. This special concoction is now packed with surprising health perks for all.

stories.original_headline: The Motorola Razr Fold is shaping up to be pure flagship
stories.original_summary: Motorola has revealed a little more about its upcoming folding phone, and all signs point toward a premium option - not the budget-friendlier alternative the category could use. For starters, the Razr Fold will cost €1,999 (about $2,350) bundled with the Moto Pen Ultra. It'll go on sale first in Eur
stories.fantasy_headline: Moto-Razr Guild Unveils Pricy New Folding Scrying Slate!
stories.fantasy_story: The esteemed Guild of Moto-Razr has revealed more about their new folding scrying slate. It promises to be a powerful, high-end magical artifact for only the wealthiest. Rumored to cost many thousands of gold coins, it comes bundled with a special enchanted stylus and will first appear in the Western Kingdoms.

stories.original_headline: A robot arm with puppy dog eyes is just one of Lenovo’s new desktop AI concepts
stories.original_summary: Alongside a handful of new laptop concepts (and a range of real products too), Lenovo used MWC to announce a pair of AI-based productivity companion concepts. Both are standalone desk devices designed to boost productivity while providing office workers with a bit of artificial dystopic companionshi
stories.fantasy_headline: Lenovo Clan Unveils Charming New Magical Desk Companions!
stories.fantasy_story: The Lenovo Clan has unveiled curious new magical desk companions, including a golem arm with an animated, friendly gaze. These intelligent constructs are designed to assist scribes and guild members with their tasks. They promise to boost efficiency and offer a touch of enchanted companionship.
